case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. GUSTAVO DASILVA FIRMINO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED OCT-15-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FIRMINO, GUSTAVO DASILVA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIRMINO, GUSTAVO DASILVA $639.52 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $719.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $639.52 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FIRMINO, GUSTAVO DASILVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT GUSTAVO DASILVA FIRMINO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.
